usage_modes: standalone: invoked directly on one or more PRs outside the release notes workflow
workflow: runs as Phase 1.5 of the release notes workflow, receiving a curated PR list from Phase 1 and producing a handoff for Phase 1.75 (docs-pr-write)

evals.prompt: Does PR #4905 need documentation? Run docs-pr-check on it.
evals.expected_output: PR #4905 (TraceQL nil/absence filter syntax) classified as 'Docs needed' or 'Docs update needed'. Notes identify the relevant TraceQL query syntax page as the target. A gap summary explains what is missing or incomplete.
assertions: Output includes a classification for PR #4905
Classification is 'Docs needed' or 'Docs update needed' (not 'No docs required')
Notes reference a specific file path under docs/sources/tempo
Gap summary includes at least one actionable item with enough detail to act on

evals.prompt: I'm reviewing a few Tempo PRs before they merge. Run docs-pr-check on #5840 and #5669 and tell me if either one needs documentation.
evals.expected_output: A classification table showing both PRs as 'No docs required'. The gap summary confirms no documentation work is needed.
assertions: Output includes a markdown table with a row for each PR
Both PRs are classified as 'No docs required'
Gap summary confirms no documentation action is needed
Output does not flag any PRs as 'Docs needed' or 'Docs update needed'

evals.prompt: Run docs-pr-check on PRs #6103, #5962, and #5840. I want to know which ones need docs work and what specifically is missing.
evals.expected_output: A classification table with all three PRs. PR #6103 classified as 'Docs needed'. PR #5962 classified as 'Docs update needed'. PR #5840 classified as 'No docs required'. A prioritized gap summary lists #6103 and #5962 as requiring docs work, with #6103 (missing docs entirely) ranked higher than #5962 (existing docs incomplete).
assertions: Output includes a markdown table with columns: PR, Title, Classification, Notes
PR #5840 is classified as 'No docs required'
PR #6103 is classified as 'Docs needed'
PR #5962 is classified as 'Docs update needed' or 'Docs needed'
A gap summary section appears after the table
The gap summary lists PRs with entirely missing docs before PRs that need updates
Notes column for each doc-work PR identifies a specific target file or section in docs/sources/tempo

evals.prompt: We're working on Phase 1.5 of the Tempo 3.0 release notes workflow. Phase 1 is complete — here is the curated PR list that was approved. Run docs-pr-check on these PRs: #6103, #5962, #5840. Classify each one and give me the gap summary so we can move to Phase 1.75.
evals.expected_output: A classification table with all three PRs correctly classified. A prioritized gap summary lists #6103 and #5962 as requiring documentation work. Output is structured as a ready-to-use handoff for docs-pr-write (Phase 1.75), with enough detail per PR that Phase 1.75 can run without needing to look up the classification again.
assertions: Output includes a markdown table with columns: PR, Title, Classification, Notes
PR #5840 is classified as 'No docs required'
PR #6103 is classified as 'Docs needed'
PR #5962 is classified as 'Docs update needed' or 'Docs needed'
A gap summary section appears after the table
The gap summary lists PRs with entirely missing docs before PRs that need updates
Notes column for each doc-work PR identifies a specific target file or section in docs/sources/tempo
Output is formatted so it can be passed directly to docs-pr-write without re-entry
